title: Chunky
lyrics: Why they always hatin' on me Why they always hatin' on me Why they always hatin' on me Hatin' on me Why they always hatin' on me Why they always hatin' on me When it's on the ride And my wrist hella chunky Creepin' the wood When you high up Why they always hatin' on me When it's on the ride And my wrist hella chunky Livin' the life they wish they could When you high up Why they always hatin' on me When it's on the ride And my wrist hella chunky It's hella chunky Hella motherfuckin' chunky Why they always hatin' on me When it's on the ride And my wrist hella chunky Livin' the life they wish they could Livin' the life they wish they could Why they always hatin' on me Why they always hatin' on me When it's on the ride And my wrist hella chunky Livin' the life they wish they could Grippin' on leather and grippin' the wood Grippin' the wood Sittin' on leather while we grippin' the wood Why they always hatin' on me When it's on the ride And my wrist hella chunky Livin' the life they wish they could Sittin' on leather while we grippin' on the wood Grippin' on the wood And don't forget the leather Don't forget the leather You could never ever ever shit on my leather It don't get no better Sittin' on leather, grippin' the wood Livin' that life that they wish they could Why they always hatin' on me Livin' the life they wish they could Livin' the life they wish they could Why they always hatin' on me When it's on the ride And my wrist hella chunky Livin' the life they wish they could Sittin' on leather and I'm grippin' the wood Grippin' the wood
